full_description: FocusTimer is a productivity app that utilizes the Pomodoro Technique to help users stay focused and avoid distractions. The app offers customizable timers and scheduling features to boost productivity. With FocusTimer, you can create a schedule that suits your needs, set timers for work and break sessions, and track your progress over time. The app is designed to be simple and easy to use, allowing you to get started right away. Features include: customizable work and break timers, scheduling for multiple sessions, progress tracking, and customizable alerts. Whether you're a student, professional, or anyone looking to improve your focus and productivity, FocusTimer is the perfect tool to help you achieve your goals.
